Where did all the pretty horses go?: Hmm, that was interesting.  But it would probably not be a good idea to repeat the experience.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 嗯，那很有趣。但重複那種經驗可能不是個好主意。

Where did all the pretty horses go?: You don't need to do that right now.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 你現在不需要這樣做。

Where did all the pretty horses go?: Your senses gradually return to normal.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 你的感官逐漸恢復正常。

Where did all the pretty horses go?: You ingest a few of the mushrooms from the Fairy Ring.  They taste delicious.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 你吃下妖精環的幾顆蘑菇。它們嚐起來很美味。

Where did all the pretty horses go?: Wow!  Look at all the nice paisley horses!
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 哇!看看所有漂亮的西洋花紋馬!

Where did all the pretty horses go?: Not to mention the beautiful neon sky.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 更別說那美麗的霓虹天空。

Where did all the pretty horses go?: The mushrooms from the Fairy Ring are pretty good, so you hear.  However, when they're mixed with Kobold toadstools... that's a horse of a different color.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 據你所聽，妖精環的蘑菇相當不錯。不過，當它們與地精菌類混在一起時...那就另當別論了。

Where did all the pretty horses go?: You eat some of the Kobold's fungus.  Within seconds your insides feel like they're on fire.  Guess you're not a Kobold, huh?
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 你吃了一些地精的菌類。幾秒內你的內臟就像著火一樣。看來你不是地精，是吧?

Where did all the pretty horses go?: Didn't anyone warn you about eating other people's food?  Death by Toadstools doesn't leave mushroom for improvement.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 沒人警告你不要吃別人的食物嗎?被菌類毒死不會讓人進步。

Where did all the pretty horses go?: You think that you'd better take it easy for a while until you recover.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 你認為你最好休息一陣子，直到康復為止。

Where did all the pretty horses go?: Play it again, Ludwig.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 再彈一次，路德維希。

Where did all the pretty horses go?: You read it again and puzzle over its meaning.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 你再讀一次，思考它的意義。

Where did all the pretty horses go?: They're nice, but they don't go with your outfit.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 它們很漂亮，但與你的裝扮不搭。

Where did all the pretty horses go?: The rations are tasteless but filling.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 口糧沒味道但很飽。

Where did all the pretty horses go?: It's not your size.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 這不是你的尺寸。

Where did all the pretty horses go?: After wiping the plant saliva from it, you examine the large seed.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 擦掉上面的植物分泌物後，你檢查這顆大種子。

Where did all the pretty horses go?: That wasn't quite what the Surgeon General meant when he suggested you use a shield.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 這不太是醫療總署長建議你拿盾牌時的意思。

Where did all the pretty horses go?: You check to see if your money's still there. Yep, it is.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 你查看你的錢是否還在。是的，在。

Where did all the pretty horses go?: The drink is invigorating.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 這飲料令人精神振奮。

Where did all the pretty horses go?: You prepare to fall on your sword, but you finally decide that it would be uncomfortable.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 你準備自刎，但最後決定那會不舒服。

Where did all the pretty horses go?: You remain amazed at the number and versatility of the little gimcracks and thingamabobs inside your thief's tool kit.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 你對盜賊工具包內小工具和各種小玩意兒的數量和多功能性依然驚嘆。

Where did all the pretty horses go?: The picture on your thief's license doesn't look a bit like you.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 你的盜賊執照上的照片完全不像你。

Where did all the pretty horses go?: You try on the troll beard, but the goat-like smell convinces you to remain clean-shaven for a while.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 你試戴巨魔的鬍子，但那羊一樣的味道使你決定暫時保持光潔。

Where did all the pretty horses go?: The vase makes an even worse hat than the candelabra.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 花瓶作為帽子比燭台更糟。

Where did all the pretty horses go?: You eat some vegetables.  You think they would have been better saved for cows or horses.  Real Heroes eat preserved dry rations.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 你吃了一些蔬菜。你認為它們本應留給牛或馬。真正的英雄吃乾糧。

Where did all the pretty horses go?: Mumble, mumble... overworked... mumble... underpaid... mumble, mumble... no control over my life...
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 碎碎念...累死了...碎碎念...薪水太少...碎碎念...對人生無法掌控...

Where did all the pretty horses go?: You pour the contents of the flask all over.  Maybe you're not doing this right.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 你把烈酒瓶的內容物倒得滿地。也許你做得不對。

Where did all the pretty horses go?: There's no point in trying to use one of those there.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 沒有必要試著在那邊用那個。

Where did all the pretty horses go?: It's not much to look at.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 它看起來沒什麼。

Where did all the pretty horses go?: To whom were you trying to speak?
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 你想跟誰說話?

Where did all the pretty horses go?: There's nothing to do there.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 那邊沒什麼可做的。

Where did all the pretty horses go?: Your money's no good here.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 你的錢在這邊沒用。

Where did all the pretty horses go?: Aggressive, aren't you?
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 你很好戰嘛?

Where did all the pretty horses go?: Picky, picky, picky.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 挑剔，挑剔，挑剔。

Where did all the pretty horses go?: You fought so hard for this key, you just can't bear to part with it.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 你為這把鑰匙奮力戰鬥，捨不得放手。

Where did all the pretty horses go?: You might be able to get some money for the candelabra, but, other than that, it's useless.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 你也許能靠燭台換一些錢，不過除此之外，它沒用。

Where did all the pretty horses go?: Behind the velvet curtains is an alcove leading to the offices of the Baron.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 絲絨窗簾後有一個通往男爵辦公室的小拐角。

Where did all the pretty horses go?: I sincerely hope you will continue your valiant adventures in our land.  If anyone can rid the land of brigands, it will be you.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「我衷心希望你能在我們的土地上繼續英勇的冒險。如果有人能清除山賊，那就是你。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: Someday in the near future, I can envision holding a ceremony in your honor and bestowing upon you the title, `Hero of Spielburg'.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「不久的將來某一天，我能想像為你舉辦典禮，並賜予你『史畢柏格英雄』的頭銜。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: As you leave the castle tomorrow, you will receive the reward money I long ago posted for the safe return of my son, as a token of my thanks.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「當你明天離開城堡時，你將收到我早前為兒子安全歸來而懸賞的獎金，作為我感謝的表證。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: You will, of course, be expected to dine with us and be our guest in the castle tonight.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「當然，你將被期待與我們共進晚宴，並在城堡內作我們的客人過夜。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: Words cannot express the gratitude I have towards you.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「言語無法表達我對你的感謝。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: Not only have you freed the Baronet from enchantment and allowed my son to return to me, but you have renewed my hope that the curse may be lifted.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「你不僅解除了男爵之子的魔咒，讓我的兒子回到我身邊，還使我重新燃起詛咒被解除的希望。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: My son, Baronet Barnard von Spielburg, also desires to acknowledge his indebtedness.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「我的兒子，史畢柏格男爵之子巴納德，也想表達他的感謝。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: Barnard.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「巴納德。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: Do you have any questions?
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「你有任何問題嗎?」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: A servant is awaiting you outside to show you to your quarters.  We will see you at supper later.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「有個僕人在外面等著帶你到你的房間。我們晚餐時見。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: Furthermore, I understand you have rid our valley of a dangerous Kobold Magic User in order to free the Baronet von Spielburg.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「此外，我瞭解你消滅了一個危險的地精法師來解救史畢柏格男爵之子。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: You risked your life to singlehandedly defeat the foul Spellcaster.  You are a true hero, and I thank you.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「你冒著生命危險獨自擊敗了邪惡的咒語使者。你是真正的英雄，我感謝你。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: The Baron von Spielburg looks like he was once a strong man, but sorrow has aged him greatly.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「史畢柏格男爵看起來曾是個強人，但悲傷已經使他蒼老了許多。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: Curse
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「詛咒」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: Daughter
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「女兒」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: Brigand Leader
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「山賊首領」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: Prophecy
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「預言」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: I have attempted everything in my power to get her to go away.  I fear it will take some kind of magic to be able to counteract her magic.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「我已竭盡所能要她離開。我擔心需要某種魔法才能對抗她的魔法。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: I am Stefan von Spielburg, 12th Baron of Spielburg castle.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「我是史蒂芬·馮·史畢柏格，史畢柏格城堡的第 12 任男爵。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: If I had more guards, I would wipe the brigands out myself now that I have my son at my side.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「如果我有更多守衛，既然有我的兒子在身邊，我會親自消滅山賊。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: It will take some time before this castle and land have recovered from my sorrow, so I still think it will take a Hero to destroy the brigands.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「城堡和領地需要一些時間才能從我的悲傷中恢復，所以我仍然認為需要一個英雄來摧毀山賊。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: I know they have some kind of fortress at the far south of the valley.  I have heard rumors they have set up an ambush for all that approach.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「我知道他們在山谷的最南端有某種要塞。我聽說他們已為所有接近的人設置了埋伏。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: It is also rumored that there is another way into their fortress, but I have no further knowledge about it.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「還有傳言說有另一條進入他們要塞的路，但我沒有更多的資訊。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: This castle has been in the family for two centuries now as a gift from King Siegfried the Third.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「這座城堡現在已經是我們家族 200 年的古蹟，是齊格弗里德三世國王的禮物。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: Some years back, I tried to force the Ogress Baba Yaga to leave our valley and she put a curse upon me that I should lose everything I held dear.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「多年前，我試圖強行讓食人妖芭芭雅嘎離開我們的山谷，她對我施加了詛咒，使我失去一切所愛的事物。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: When I lost my daughter and my son, I lost all interest in living.  My lands suffered because I suffered.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「當我失去女兒和兒子時，我對生活失去了所有興趣。我的領地因為我的痛苦而受苦。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: Now, though, with the return of my son, I trust the prophecy is about to come true, thanks to you.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「不過，現在隨著我兒子的歸來，我相信預言就要應驗了，感謝你。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: My beautiful little daughter was stolen away ten years ago by Baba Yaga's magic.  She has never been found, despite all the searching that has been done for her.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「我美麗的小女兒十年前被芭芭雅嘎的魔法奪走了。儘管進行了各種搜尋，她一直沒有被找到。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: I thought she was lost forever, but you have renewed my hope that I will again have her beside me.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「我以為她永遠丟失了，但你重新點燃了我再次擁有她的希望。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: There have always been brigands around, but until the leader and the warlock showed up a few years ago, they were not much of a problem.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「一直都有山賊，但直到幾年前首領和巫師出現，他們才成為大問題。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: The leader seems to be a brilliant strategist who manages each raid with little loss.  Once the leader is gone, I am sure the brigands can be easily defeated.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「首領似乎是個卓越的戰略家，每次襲擊都損失很少。首領一旦消滅，我相信山賊就能輕易被擊敗。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: I know very little about magic, much to my sorrow.  Perhaps you should talk to the wizards Zara in town or Erasmus on Zauberberg.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「讓我遺憾的是，我對魔法知之甚少。也許你應該去鎮上和法師札拉或魔法山上的伊拉斯謨談談。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: The prophecy states: 'Comes a Hero from the East, Free the man from in the beast; Bring the child from out the band; Drive the curser from the land.'
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「預言說:『東方來英雄，獸中人得解；群中子安返；詛咒者逐出境。』」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: You entered here from the east, and you released my son from the form of a bear. I am certain you can fulfill the rest of it, and remove this dreadful curse.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「你從東方進來，將我的兒子從熊的形態中解救出來。我確信你能完成其餘的部分，解除這個可怕的詛咒。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: I have offered substantial rewards for the return of my son and my daughter, as well as for the leader and warlock of the brigands.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「我對我兒子和女兒的歸來，以及山賊首領和巫師的消息開出了豐厚的賞金。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: As if this valley hasn't been plagued with enough evil magic users!  From what I have heard, his magic isn't powerful, but it is used effectively.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「好像這山谷還沒被足夠的邪惡魔法使者困擾!根據我所聽到的，他的魔法並不強大，但使用得非常有效。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: Yorick was my court jester, a man of infinite jest.  He went off to find my daughter.  But alas, poor Yorick never returned.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「尤瑞克是我的廷臣弄臣，一個無限幽默的人。他離開去尋找我的女兒。但唉，可憐的尤瑞克再也沒有回來。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: It would be nice if someone could finally defeat the brigands and claim the title.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「如果有人能最終擊敗山賊並獲得頭銜就好了。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: We, er, that is, I, am appreciative of your efforts upon my behalf.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「呃，也就是說，我，對你代表我所做的努力表示感謝。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: I'm pleased you managed to kill the Kobold.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「我很高興你設法殺死了地精。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: The Baronet looks his usual haughty self, although his clothes are a little neater than the last time you saw him.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「男爵之子看起來還是老樣子，自命不凡，雖然他的衣服比你上次看到他時整潔一點。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: Bear
Kobold
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「地精」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: I am Baronet Barnard von Spielburg, heir to the lands and all within.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「我是男爵之子巴納德·馮·史畢柏格，土地和其中一切的繼承人。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: I would prefer not to talk about that.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「我寧願不談這個。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: I will soon lead the troops against the Brigands and wipe them from this land.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「我即將率領軍隊對抗山賊並將他們從這片土地上消滅。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: I rode off one morning with my men in search of monsters to fight.  I got separated from my men when I came across the entrance to the cave.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「我一大早騎馬和我的人去尋找怪物戰鬥。當我來到洞穴入口時，我與我的人走散了。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: As I entered, the Kobold ordered ME to get out.  I informed it that I was Baronet Barnard von Spielburg and heir to the lands and all within.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「當我進入時，地精命令我滾出去。我告訴它我是男爵之子巴納德·馮·史畢柏格，土地和其中一切的繼承人。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: I ordered it to bow before me.  Then it cast a spell upon me and I remember very little after that.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「我命令它在我面前跪拜。然後它對我施了一個咒語，之後我幾乎不記得發生了什麼。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: A brazier stands ready for the evenings coals.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「火盆已準備好放今晚的煤炭。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: The couch must be a precious heirloom; why else would the Baron keep such an uncomfortable-looking piece of furniture around?
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「沙發一定是珍貴的傳家寶；否則男爵為什麼會保留這樣一件看起來不舒服的傢俱?」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: The von Spielburg coat of arms:  Twin Saurus guarding, Winged Chevron, on a field Azure.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「馮·史畢柏格家徽:雙索魯斯守衛，翼形紋章，藍色背景。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: The guards stand stiffly at attention.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「守衛們挺直身體立正。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: The guards are not free to speak.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「守衛不能自由說話。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: A roast pig waits on the sideboard to be your supper.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「烤豬在邊櫃上等著作為你的晚餐。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: The Baron collected these pillars on an ocean quest for an undersea kingdom.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「男爵在尋求水下王國的海洋冒險中收集了這些柱子。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: You'd better stay in the main hall.  It wouldn't be wise to offend the Baron.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「你最好留在大廳。冒犯男爵不明智。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: Suddenly, you hear voices, seeming to come from everywhere at once.  They all sound like Baba Yaga, and they all say:
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「突然，你聽到聲音，似乎來自四面八方。他們都聽起來像芭芭雅嘎，都說:」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: Wheeeeeere's myyyyyy Maaaandraaaaake Rooooooooooooot????
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「我的曼德拉根根根在哪裡????」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: The Great Hall of Spielburg Castle is not very impressive.  The room is plain, with scuffed floors and grimy plastered walls.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「史畢柏格城堡的大廳不太令人印象深刻。房間很簡樸，地板磨損，灰泥牆壁骯髒。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: You are less than awed by Baron von Spielburg's Great Hall.  You'd think a Baron could keep his home a little cleaner.  You try to hide your disappointment.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「你對馮·史畢柏格男爵的大廳沒什麼印象。你會認為男爵可以讓他的家稍微整潔一點。你試著隱藏你的失望。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: You rehearse your award acceptance speech.
漂亮的馬都到哪去了?: 「你排練你的獲獎感言。」

Where did all the pretty horses go?: A vase from the Ding Dynasty.  (So named because their stoneware makes a pleasant bell-like sound when tapped with a fingernail.)
